evals.prompt: I have a surface code circuit at out/circuits/surface_d5.stim. I want to generate: (1) a timeline SVG diagram, (2) detector slice diagrams at ticks 0, 3, and 6, and (3) a crumble URL so I can open it in the browser. Can you write the script?
evals.expected_output: A Python script that loads the circuit and generates all three types of outputs: timeline-svg saved to file, detslice-svg at specific ticks, and to_crumble_url() for browser viewing. Should use uv run --with stim.

evals.prompt: I'm debugging a circuit and want to understand the detector structure. Can you show me how to generate a detslice-with-ops-svg diagram and also a matchgraph-svg from the DEM? The circuit is at out/circuits/color_d3.stim.
evals.expected_output: A Python script that generates detslice-with-ops-svg and matchgraph-svg diagrams. Should include DEM extraction for the matchgraph. May also suggest opening in crumble for interactive debugging.
